title: HTML Entity Encoder & Decoder
description: Two-way HTML entity converter that runs fully in the browser. Five encoding strengths (minimal, named, decimal / hex code points, named-with-hex fallback), lenient decoding, and full Unicode / emoji support.

notice.title: Fully local
notice.body: All encoding and decoding happens in your browser. Nothing is uploaded, so it is safe to paste snippets that contain sensitive content.

decode.hint: Lenient decoding: accepts &name; / &#nnnn; / &#xHHHH;, semicolon optional, unknown entities are kept verbatim.

input.encodePlaceholder: Paste your HTML or plain text here…

output.placeholder: Conversion result will appear here in real time
